description: You are a Technical Writer for AeroTech Dynamics. Compile the final 'AeroTurbine 500-X Operator Manual' by creating a Master Document (.odm) that links the five chapter files located in '/home/ga/Documents/chapters/' in numerical order (01 through 05). The document must include the title 'AeroTurbine 500-X Operator Manual' at the top, followed by an automatic Table of Contents before the first chapter. Save the final document to /home/ga/Documents/AeroTurbine_Master.odm.
